name: ELI LILLY & Co
summary: Eli Lilly and Company, incorporated in 1901 in Indiana, discovers, develops, manufactures, and markets human pharmaceutical products worldwide. Operating in a single business segment, Lilly sells products in approximately 90 countries across therapeutic areas including cardiometabolic health (Mounjaro, Zepbound, Jardiance, Humalog), oncology (Verzenio, Cyramza, Retevmo, Jaypirca), immunology (Ebglyss, Olumiant), and neuroscience. The company manufactures and distributes through facilities in the U.S., Puerto Rico, Europe, and Asia.

products.name: Mounjaro
products.description: GIP and GLP-1 receptor agonist for treatment of adults with type 2 diabetes.

products.name: Zepbound
products.description: For treatment of adults with obesity or overweight and moderate to severe obstructive sleep apnea.

products.name: Jardiance
products.description: For treatment of type 2 diabetes, cardiovascular disease risk reduction, and chronic kidney disease.

products.name: Humalog
products.description: Human insulin analog for treatment of diabetes.

products.name: Humulin
products.description: Human insulins of recombinant DNA origin for treatment of diabetes.

products.name: Basaglar
products.description: Long-acting human insulin analog for treatment of diabetes, in collaboration with Boehringer Ingelheim.

products.name: Trulicity
products.description: For treatment of type 2 diabetes in adults and pediatric patients and cardiovascular risk reduction.

products.name: Verzenio
products.description: For treatment of HR+, HER2- metastatic and early breast cancer.

products.name: Cyramza
products.description: For treatment of multiple advanced or metastatic cancers including gastric, NSCLC, colorectal, and hepatocellular.

products.name: Erbitux
products.description: For treatment of certain colorectal and head and neck cancers.

products.name: Retevmo
products.description: For treatment of RET fusion-positive NSCLC, thyroid cancer, and other solid tumors.

products.name: Jaypirca
products.description: For treatment of relapsed or refractory CLL/SLL and mantle cell lymphoma.

products.name: Inluriyo
products.description: For treatment of ER-positive HER2-negative ESR1-mutated advanced or metastatic breast cancer.

products.name: Tyvyt
products.description: For treatment of multiple cancers in China, in collaboration with Innovent Biologics.

products.name: Ebglyss
products.description: For treatment of moderate to severe atopic dermatitis in adults and adolescents 12 years or older.

products.name: Olumiant
products.description: For treatment of rheumatoid arthritis, atopic dermatitis, alopecia areata, and COVID-19 in adults.

partnerships.description: Collaboration on Basaglar (insulin analog) and Jardiance (type 2 diabetes and cardiovascular).
Collaboration on Tyvyt for multiple oncology indications in China.
Collaboration on Olumiant for rheumatoid arthritis, atopic dermatitis, and alopecia areata.
Collaboration on Ebglyss for atopic dermatitis in Europe.
